exercises.title: Basic Practice
exercises.description: Type these words: yah, hai, main, tum, hum, kya, achha, theek, haan, nahi, karo, jao, aao, lo, de

solution.code: yah, hai, main, tum, hum, kya, achha, theek, haan, nahi, karo, jao, aao, lo, de

exercises.title: Sentence Practice
exercises.description: Type each sentence without looking at the keyboard.

solution.code:
main accha hoon
tum kaise ho
yah bahut achha hai
hum sab saath mein hain
kya tum chalte ho
haan main samajhta hoon
nahi mujhe nahi chahiye
aao baithte hain
yahan aao
dekho yeh dekho
